mapper.insert: INSERT INTO indicator_daily ( product_id, trade_date, window_days, pct_rank, q_buy_price, q_mid_price, q_high_price, peak_close, drawdown_from_peak, ma20, ma60, created_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{tradeDate}, #{windowDays}, #{pctRank}, #{qBuyPrice}, #{qMidPrice}, #{qHighPrice}, #{peakClose}, #{drawdownFromPeak}, #{ma20}, #{ma60}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pct_rank = VALUES(pct_rank), q_buy_price = VALUES(q_buy_price), q_mid_price = VALUES(q_mid_price), q_high_price = VALUES(q_high_price), peak_close = VALUES(peak_close), drawdown_from_peak = VALUES(drawdown_from_peak), ma20 = VALUES(ma20), ma60 = VALUES(ma60)
mapper.update: UPDATE indicator_daily SET pct_rank = #{pctRank}, q_buy_price = #{qBuyPrice}, q_mid_price = #{qMidPrice}, q_high_price = #{qHighPrice}, peak_close = #{peakClose}, drawdown_from_peak = #{drawdownFromPeak}, ma20 = #{ma20}, ma60 = #{ma60} WHERE id = #{id}
